images.description: One row per standalone RGB camera image.

ego_poses.description: One row per vehicle pose timestep from v2 vehicle_pose.

trajectories.description: One row per scene/object 3D trajectory from box labels.

image_trajectories.description: Visible trajectory IDs and 2D projected boxes for each image.

prediction_targets.description: WOMD tracks_to_predict with observed history and optional future labels.
